ruleBookInfo.author: $.author
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
var book_id = "";
var bookIdMatch = baseUrl.match(/book_id=(\d+)/i) || 
                  baseUrl.match(/query=(\d+)/) || 
                  baseUrl.match(/d=(\d{19})/i) || 
                  baseUrl.match(/(\d{19})/i);
if (bookIdMatch) book_id = bookIdMatch[1];

var targetBookId = book_id || baseUrl.match(/\d{19}/)?.[0];
if (targetBookId) {
    var newResult = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/detail?book_id=" + targetBookId);
    var newRes = JSON.parse(newResult);
    var data = null;
    if (newRes.data) {
        if (Array.isArray(newRes.data)) {
            data = newRes.data[0];
        } else if (newRes.data.book_info) {
            data = newRes.data;
        } else {
            data = newRes.data;
        }
    }
}

if (java.get("fqdown") == "on") {
    book.type = 128;
}

if (book_id) {
    try {
        var sessionid = getSessionId();
        if (sessionid && (java.get("book_sync") ?? "off") == "on") {
            var syncUrl = getServerHost() + "/update_history?book_id=" + book_id + "&sessionid=" + sessionid;
            java.ajax(syncUrl);
        }
    } catch (e) {
        java.log("同步阅读历史失败: " + e);
    }
}

JSON.stringify(data);
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name: $.book_name

ruleContent.content:
<js>
if (deviceType()) {
    try {
        let isLightReading = isQRead.call(this);
        
        if (!isLightReading) {
            let isModifiedVersion = checkEnv.call(this);
            if (!isModifiedVersion) {
                book.imageStyle = "TEXT";
            } else {
                book.imageStyle = "FULL";
            }
        }
    } catch (e) {
        book.imageStyle = "TEXT";
    }
}

let url = java.hexDecodeToString(result);
let contenturl = `${getServerHost()}/need_chapter?${url}`;
let response = java.ajax(contenturl);

let content = JSON.parse(response).data.content;

if (java.get("fqpara") == "on") {
    content = content.replace(/\n+/g,"\n");
    
    let bidMatch = contenturl.match(/book_id=([^&]+)/);
    let cidMatch = contenturl.match(/item_id=([^&]+)/);
    
    if (bidMatch && cidMatch) {
        let bid = bidMatch[1];
        let cid = cidMatch[1];
        content = getComments(content, bid, cid);
    }
}

content;
</js>

ruleExplore.author: $.author
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
function getBookIdFull(url) {
    const {java} = this;
    let $ = JSON.parse(url).data;
    let arr = [];
    if ($.book_shelf_info && $.book_shelf_info.length > 0) {
        arr = $.book_shelf_info.map(item => item.book_id);
    } else if ($.data_list && $.data_list.length > 0) {
        arr = $.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str);
    } else {
        java.toast("获取 book_id 失败，你可能需要登录！");
    }
    return arr;
}

let ck = "sessionid=" + (String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) ? String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) : (source.getLoginInfoMap() ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {})['手动登录Token']);

function getShelf() {
    let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700';
    let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
        headers: {
            'Cookie': ck
        }
    }));

    let arrB = [];
    let shelfData = JSON.parse(book_shelf_info).data;
    for (let i of shelfData.book_shelf_info) {
        arrB.push(i.book_id);
    }
    
    if (shelfData.user_info && shelfData.user_info.user_id) {
        userinfo.userid = shelfData.user_info.user_id;
        write_config('userinfo', userinfo);
    }
    
    if (userinfo.userid && !isNaN(parseInt(userinfo.userid))) {
        write_config('bookshelf.' + userinfo.userid, arrB);
    }

    let bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info);
    let id_list = splitArray(bid, 200);
    let urls = [];
    id_list.forEach(i => {
        urls.push(getServerHost() + "/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","));
    });

    let res = java.ajaxAll(urls);

    let resp = {book_info: []};
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data);
    });

    return resp;
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
    let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700';

    let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
        headers: {
            'Cookie': ck,
        }
    })));
    let group_bookids = {
        "未分组": []
    };
    book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
        if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = [];
        group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id);
    });
    
    if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []};
    
    let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 200);
    let urls = [];

    book_ids.forEach(i => {
        urls.push(getServerHost() + "/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","));
    });
    
    let res = java.ajaxAll(urls);

    let resp = {book_info: []};
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data);
    });

    return resp;
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
    let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
        "bookmall/tab",
        "version_name=5.8.9.32",
        null,
        ck
    );
    let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
    let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data;
    if (!tab) tab = [];
    let bookList = [];
    for (let i of tab) {
        bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data);
    }
    return { book_info: bookList };
}

function getGuessYouLike() {
    let apiUrl = 'https://reading.snssdk.com/reading/bookapi/bookmall/tab/v/?version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048&aid=1967&channel=0&os_version=0&app_name=novelapp&version_code=58932&device_platform=android';
    let response = java.ajax(apiUrl + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
        headers: {
            'Cookie': ck
        }
    }));
    let responseData = JSON.parse(response);
    let finalResult = {
        code: 0,
        message: 'SUCCESS',
        data: {
            cell_view: {
                book_data: []
            }
        }
    };
    if (responseData && responseData.data && responseData.data.tab_item && responseData.data.tab_item.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data) {
        finalResult.data.cell_view.book_data = responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data;
    }
    return finalResult;
}

function normalizeResponse(data) {
    if (data.data && data.data.book_list && Array.isArray(data.data.book_list)) {
        return data.data.book_list;
    }
    if (data.video_info && Array.isArray(data.video_info)) {
        return data.video_info;
    }
    if (data.book_info) return data.book_info;
    if (data.data && data.data.book_info) return data.data.book_info;
    if (data.data && Array.isArray(data.data)) return data.data;
    if (data.list) return data.list;
    if (data.book_list) return data.book_list;
    if (data.data && data.data.publication_list) return data.data.publication_list;
    if (data.result) return data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.result) return data.data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.cell_view && data.data.cell_view.book_data) {
        return data.data.cell_view.book_data;
    }
    return [];
}

let finalData;
if (baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let selectedItems = java.get("sortkey") || "";
    
    if (selectedItems == "未选择") {
        selectedItems = "";
    }
    
    if (selectedItems !== "") {
        result = java.ajax(baseUrl + selectedItems);
    } else {
        result = java.ajax(baseUrl);
    }
    let responseData = JSON.parse(result);
    if (responseData.data && responseData.data.video_info) {
        finalData = responseData.data;
    } else if (responseData.data && responseData.data.data) {
        finalData = {book_info: responseData.data.data};
    } else {
        finalData = responseData;
    }
} else if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) {
    finalData = getShelf();
} else if(/read_history/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let bid = getBookIdFull(result);
    let id_list = splitArray(bid, 200);
    let urls = [];
    id_list.forEach(i => {
        urls.push(getServerHost() + "/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","));
    });
    let resp = {book_info: []};
    urls.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(java.ajax(r)).data);
    });
    finalData = resp;
} else if (baseUrl.includes("style_top")) {
    let responseData = JSON.parse(result);
    finalData = responseData;
} else if (baseUrl.includes("/tab/cai")) {
    finalData = getGuessYouLike();
} else {
    let w = baseUrl.split("/");
    if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
        finalData = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1]);
    } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
        finalData = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]));
    } else {
        let responseData = JSON.parse(result);
        if (responseData.data && responseData.data.video_info) {
            finalData = responseData.data;
        } else if (responseData.data && responseData.data.data) {
            finalData = {book_info: responseData.data.data};
        } else {
            finalData = responseData;
        }
    }
}

let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(finalData);
JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData});
</js>
$.data[*]
ruleExplore.name: $.book_name||$.title||$.bookName

ruleSearch.author: $.author
ruleSearch.name: $.book_name||$.title

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var book_id = java.hexDecodeToString(result);

var catalogUrl = `${getServerHost()}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}`;
var catalogResponse = java.ajax(catalogUrl);
var catalogData = JSON.parse(catalogResponse);

catalogData.data.item_data_list.map((x) => {
    const contentUrl = `book_id=${book_id}&item_id=${x.item_id}`;
    const base64ContentUrl = java.base64Encode(contentUrl);
    
    const sessionId = getSessionId();

    const commentUrl = `${getServerHost()}/comment?book_id=${book_id}&item_id=${x.item_id}&sessionid=${sessionId}`;

    x.url = `data:chapterUrl;base64,${base64ContentUrl},` +
        `{"type":"qingci","js":"book ? result :'${commentUrl}'"}`;

    return x;
});
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
let searchKey = key.trim();
let tab = 1;

result = /^\d{19}$/.test(searchKey) ?  
    `${getServerHost()}/detail?book_id=${searchKey}` : 
    `${getServerHost()}/searchss?query=${java.put("key", searchKey)}&page={{(page - 1)*10}}&tab=${tab}`;
</js>
